untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) 'Keltner Channel' — not in allowed indicators list (only Bollinger Bands available); (2) 'buying climax reversal' pattern recognition — requires multi-bar pattern detection not expressible with single-bar operators; (3) 'character change' assessment — subjective multi-bar structure analysis not available as discrete indicator. Core price structure (break below prior low with close confirmation) translated, but Keltner Channel extremes, weekly EMA pullback completion, and climax identification cannot be implemented with allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Translated breakout structure (close < prev_low) and directional bias (ema_20 downtrend). Stop loss set at prior bar high (standard reversion logic). Take profit target (daily lower Keltner Channel midline) untranslatable due to missing Keltner Channel indicator. Signal heavily dependent on pattern recognition elements (climax, character change) that exceed single-condition rule capability.
